limen_function: tie one receipt to one bounded processing event in one project/lane/run
minimum_live_requirement: envelope_id envelope_type profile_version generated_at project_id lane_id run_id
claim_supported_now: LIMEN can point to one concrete observation-or-processing event at a stated time under a named profile.
forbidden_overread: Do not read stable identifiers as external witnessing, official registration, or stronger authority than the underlying source package.
shared_use: Field dictionary for methods appendix and reproducibility note

limen_function: declare exactly which source case cluster crosswalk row or artifact the receipt is about
minimum_live_requirement: kind plus id and any path_or_uri/title/version/case_id needed for context
related_external_pattern: RATS evidence subject; VC subject; SCITT statement subject
claim_supported_now: The receipt can state which bounded research object was observed or transformed.
forbidden_overread: Do not flatten source case cluster and artifact subjects into one undifferentiated truth claim.
shared_use: Reviewer-safe subject model table and dashboard provenance legend

limen_function: preserve provenance of captured sources normalized text or prior records
minimum_live_requirement: at least one input object when the processing step depends on prior material
related_external_pattern: RATS evidence inputs; C2PA-observed source artifact; SCITT statement payload source
claim_supported_now: LIMEN can show what public/open material or prior local artifact informed the step.
forbidden_overread: Do not treat presence of an input locator/hash as proof that the source allegation is true or authoritative enough by itself.

limen_function: bind emitted case rows cluster rows figures tables bundles or notes to the receipt
minimum_live_requirement: at least one output object when the step emits a new artifact; required for published and superseded states
related_external_pattern: RATS evidence outputs; VC subject/output binding; SCITT artifact digest
claim_supported_now: LIMEN can show what derived record or artifact was produced from stated inputs.
forbidden_overread: Do not treat derived artifact existence as proof of substantive correctness or publication witness beyond the stated output boundary.
shared_use: Artifact-derivation appendix and dashboard provenance caption

limen_function: state narrow typed process claims about observation extraction classification review clustering or derivation
minimum_live_requirement: at least one typed assertion referencing bounded supporting inputs/outputs
related_external_pattern: attestation result content; VC claim set
claim_supported_now: LIMEN can make small process statements such as tier assignment source observation or artifact derivation.
forbidden_overread: Do not write assertions that claim truth legality compliance certification safety or final authenticity.

limen_function: record bounded appraisal state and explicit cautions
minimum_live_requirement: mandatory for reviewed receipts; optional elsewhere
claim_supported_now: LIMEN can show that a receipt or derived row was lane-checked human-reviewed or flagged for revision.
forbidden_overread: Do not present review completion as legal validation factual validation or universal correctness.
shared_use: Review-discipline methods note and limitations sidebar

limen_function: reserve or evidence publication-log state for one published artifact
minimum_live_requirement: real log system receipt URI receipt hash and proof state before any logged/proof claim
claim_supported_now: Only a real receipt can justify saying one artifact was submitted to and possibly verified in a transparency system.
forbidden_overread: Do not describe empty or placeholder transparency metadata as log inclusion non-repudiation or third-party endorsement.
shared_use: Standards/interoperability ladder and Route C future-work note

limen_function: reserve or evidence portable credential packaging for process-only claims
minimum_live_requirement: real credential_id issuer and issued status before any issuance claim
claim_supported_now: Only a real issued VC can justify saying a portable issuer-bound process receipt exists.
forbidden_overread: Do not convert VC draft wiring or issuance into certification compliance proof truth or legal validation.

limen_function: reserve or evidence detached-signature integrity state for one published artifact
minimum_live_requirement: real signature ref scheme and signed_verified plus trust anchor ref and verifier note before verified-signature claim
claim_supported_now: Only a verifier-backed signed artifact can justify one bounded release-integrity statement.
forbidden_overread: Do not treat placeholder or unverified signature metadata as a completed cryptographic witness or trusted signer identity claim.

limen_function: record whether source-side content credentials matter to the observed case
minimum_live_requirement: real inspectable source-side provenance signal before any C2PA-present statement
claim_supported_now: LIMEN may describe C2PA as optional source-side provenance context when the source actually exposes it.
forbidden_overread: Do not treat C2PA presence as final authenticity legality authorship or harm resolution.

limen_function: lock every receipt to observation_and_processing_only and enumerate excluded stronger claims
claim_supported_now: The package can safely say it attests observation and processing only.
forbidden_overread: Do not let any external packaging layer silently mutate the non-claim ceiling around truth legality compliance certification safety completeness or authenticity finality.

limen_function: declare which observatory view can consume a receipt without widening the substantive claim
claim_supported_now: LIMEN can route receipts into the attestation timeline evidence funnel source map or other bounded views.
forbidden_overread: Do not treat hook presence as validation that the downstream chart is correct or publication-ready by itself.
shared_use: Dashboard provenance wiring and tooltip legend
